settings.title: Settings
settings.emailNotifications.description: Receive important updates and notifications via email

domains.title: Organization Domains
domains.description: Manage the domains associated with your organization. Users with email addresses at these domains can join automatically.
domains.noDomains: No domains have been added yet.
domains.domainDescription: Enter the domain you want to allow (e.g. example.com)
domains.autoJoinDescription: Allow users with this domain to join automatically.
domains.enforceSSODescription: Require single sign-on for users with this domain.
domains.verificationDescription: Verify your domain to enable secure access.
domains.verificationInstructions: Add a DNS record to verify your domain. See documentation for details.
